name_cn:
Genuine quality, replica version MiuMiu
New color, milk tea pink and apricot available
5BC125: MiuMiu new MiuWander handbag, featuring imported lamb leather with the classic brand signature Matelasse texture embroidery. Vintage matte hardware. Using curved lines to retain a playful feel. The bag shape is stiff and structured, full of personality. Sweet and salty. Good capacity. Almost every fashion blogger has one. Many colors available. Size: 23X13X7, comes with original packaging
